content.en:
"The extradimensional elves are too powerful!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

However, even such a powerful extradimensional elf clan did not dare to leave here casually, after all, there must be more powerful forces in the outside world.

But stay here, even the third realm won't dare to break into here.

As for the background of the extradimensional elves, he has no way of knowing at the moment.

"Mix here first, and then after cultivating for a period of time, then find a way to find an opportunity to comprehend more extradimensional rules!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, Ye Tian stayed here, very cautious, and did not communicate much with other extradimensional elves, but occasionally walked inside some open Mist Mother Fruit to learn about the information here.

In the extra-dimensional elf clan, most of the Fog Mother Fruit is not allowed to enter other Extradimensional Elves, and it must be inside the Fog Mother Fruit itself before it can enter, and if it is forcibly entered, it will be punished very severely.

Of course, there are still a few open types of Fog Mother Fruits, which can be entered by any extradimensional elves, and these open Type Fog Mother Fruits are places of trading and exchange 31 communication, which can be described as very lively.

Ye Tian often blended in here, and he became more and more aware of the intelligence of the extradimensional elf clan.

this day.

He learned a very useful information, there is a great opportunity inside the No. 10 Fog Mother Fruit, the core of the No. 10 Fog Mother Fruit has mutated, absorbed the origin of the Fog Mother Wood, and evolved into a very amazing treasure.

This core of the Mother of Mist contains the origin of the extradimensional rules, and if you understand the core of the Mother of Mist, you can strengthen the rules of the superdimension.

The two transcendental elves of the first realm were eager to enter the core of the mother of fog and comprehend the extradimensional rules, but they were not qualified.

After Ye Tian listened to their conversation, he was also looking forward to it in his heart.

"If I go to the core of the Fog Mother, I may be able to greatly improve the extradimensional rules!"

But if you want to enter the core of the fog mother, it is very difficult.

There are too many extra-dimensional elves, and there are too many extra-dimensional realms, if they all go to enlightenment, too many origins will be consumed, which will do great damage to the core of the fog mother.

Therefore, the extradimensional elves have set very strict conditions.

If you comprehend the extradimensional rules and have never comprehended the core of the mother of fog, then you can participate in the core of the mother of fog for free for ten epoch times.

If you don't comprehend the extradimensional rules and want to enter the core of the Mist, you have to pay 10,000 Mist contribution points.

But the extradimensional elves don't come out of this place, and there are not a lot of battles, so it is extremely difficult to accumulate contribution points, and it is only after endless years that there is hope to accumulate 10,000 contribution points.

If you want to accumulate contribution points quickly, you can get a large number of contribution points unless you create some amazing spells that can change or improve the overall strength of the superdimensional elves.

Otherwise, just boil it slowly.

"Comprehend the extradimensional rules, and you can get the opportunity to participate in the extradimensional era for free. "

Ye Tian's heart was moved, but he did not immediately expose the extradimensional rules.

Moreover, only ten extradimensional epochs were not too long, he only had one chance to comprehend, and with his comprehension, without the help of the strange blood pupil, he would not be able to quickly comprehend the extradimensional rules.

And his replica body doesn't have weird blood pupils, and it's not convenient to bring it in.

"I don't know if the extradimensional elves have anything similar to the weird blood pupil. "

Ye Tian began to inquire secretly, and it took a while for him to finally inquire.

......

"Mouton Realm Master, you want to trade my soul pupil?"

The vine Xuan realm lord who was at the peak of the first realm frowned slightly, he didn't understand why the Mouton realm lord wanted to trade his soul pupil, that thing was not a good thing!

The soul pupil was refined by him using a Mist Mother Leaf, a Mist Mother Fruit Stone fragment, and many other materials, and it was also accidentally refined, something that he inadvertently created when he tried to create a method of refining a superdimensional Dao soldier.

It can be said that it is difficult for him to refine the second piece.

At first, he thought that the soul pupil was an incomparably rare low-level extra-dimensional dao soldier, but after using it, he was shocked, this thing would actually damage the bloodline of the super-dimensional elves, and it was the origin of the bloodline, which was almost difficult to repair.

He hasn't used it since.

However, the soul pupil is also useful, that is, it can quickly improve the comprehension and assist in comprehending the extradimensional rules, if you use the soul pupil for a long time, you will definitely be able to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

But if you really do this, you won't want to break through to the second extradimensional realm in that life, even if you comprehend the extradimensional rules, it's useless.

After the super-dimensional elf clan comprehends the super-dimensional rules, it can promote the second metamorphosis of the super-dimensional bloodline, which is the method of the second realm breakthrough of the super-dimensional elf clan.

But once the extradimensional bloodline is seriously damaged, it is impossible to have a chance to break through.

Therefore, the Tengxuan Realm Lord didn't dare to use the soul pupil and put it away.

But this matter spread out, and many extra-dimensional elves knew about it, but they didn't expect that there were still super-dimensional elves who wanted soul pupils.

"Lord of the Tengxuan Realm, I want the soul pupil to study and study, if you are willing, please say the conditions. Ye Tian said.

The Teng Xuan Realm Lord asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian was sure.

In his eyes, the value of the soul pupil is far beyond the weird blood pupil, the weird blood pupil is just a super-dimensional thing, and the soul pupil is a super-dimensional dao soldier, and its effect must be far beyond the weird blood 247 pupils.

The Lord of the Teng Xuan Realm is very face-saving, and the price is not high, Ye Tian took out some resources and easily exchanged them for the Soul Pupil.

Soon after exchanging for the soul pupil, Ye Tian announced to the high-level super-dimensional elves that he had comprehended the super-dimensional rules. []

Soon.

A super-dimensional elf from the second realm came, and after Ye Tian demonstrated the super-dimensional rules on the spot, he immediately went back to the opportunity to enter the No. 10 Fog Mother Fruit to comprehend the core of the Fog Mother.

......

The fruit of the tenth mother of fog.

The core of the Mistlet's Mist.

Ye Tian soon came here and also saw the core of the Mist Mother.

The core of the Mist Mother is not large, and it is only the size of an ancient star.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged outside the core of the mother of fog and began to comprehend the core of the mother of fog.

He ignored the gaze of the extra-dimensional elves around him, and directly began to comprehend, and secretly urged the soul pupil that had been refined.

Rumble!!!!

Under the influence of the soul pupil, his comprehension has increased to a terrifying level, but the extra-dimensional bloodline in his body is also rapidly depleting.

If this continues, it won't be long before his extradimensional bloodline will be exhausted.

Of course, he hid his own bloodline aura, and the other extradimensional elves naturally didn't know his specific situation.

"Enlightenment!"

"Enlightenment!"

Ye Tian has been comprehending the core of the fog mother all the time, and his own extradimensional rules are rapidly improving.
